CustomField.formula: IF(Account_Completion__c *10000<30 , "Less than 30% completed" & BR() & IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004Y4YH","Less than 30%"), IF(Account_Completion__c *10000<60 ,"Less than 60% completed" & BR() & IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004Y4YM","Less than 60%"), IF(Account_Completion__c *10000<80 , "Less than 80% completed" & BR() & IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004Y4YR","Less than 80%"), IF(Account_Completion__c *10000<99 , "Less than 100% completed" & BR() & IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004Y4YW","Less than 100%"), "Perfect" & BR() & IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004Y4Yb", "Perfect")))))
CustomField.label: Account Completion Rate
